blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
